title: 9 Powerful Herbal Creams for Athletes Battling Plantar Fasciitis
description: Arnica montana creams have gained popularity as a natural remedy for plantar fasciitis due to their anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. The cream contains a compound called sesquiterpene lactones, which are known to reduce swelling and ease pain. It also contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant properties that help to soothe irritated tissues.  To use Arnica montana cream for plantar fasciitis, apply a small amount to the affected area 2-3 times a day...
